title: Apple called upon to be more open about its collection and use of information for downloads
summary: An individual alleged that he was unnecessarily required to provide payment information and his date of birth for downloading a free application from the Apple Canada Inc. (“Apple”) website because of Apple’s requirements for creating an Apple ID. Our investigation found that all customers must have an Apple ID to access online services,...
dedupKey: apple called upon to be more open about its collection and use of information for downloads|2014-04-22
